sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Take-Two Interactive Software (NASDAQ:TTWO) Price Target Raised to $300.00 at UBS Group
feed.summary: UBS Group has raised its price target for Take-Two Interactive Software (NASDAQ:TTWO) from $292.00 to $300.00, maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of 21.91%. This follows strong quarterly earnings where Take-Two exceeded estimates with $1.04 EPS and $1.77 billion in revenue. The company currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $273.11.

feed.title: Guggenheim Lowers Price Target for Domino's Pizza (DPZ) to $450
feed.summary: Guggenheim has lowered its price target for Domino's Pizza (DPZ) to $450, maintaining a 'Neutral' rating, consistent with a recent trend of analysts lowering price targets for the company. This adjustment reflects a cautious outlook, despite Domino's Pizza being the world's largest pizza chain with substantial global sales. While analysts' average price target suggests a potential upside, their recent actions indicate a more reserved market sentiment.

feed.title: Here's Why Steel Dynamics (STLD) is a Strong Momentum Stock
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics (STLD) is highlighted as a strong momentum stock based on Zacks Style Scores. The article explains the Zacks Rank and Style Scores (Value, Growth, Momentum, VGM), emphasizing that STLD has a Momentum Style Score of A and a VGM Score of A, despite a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold). Recent positive earnings estimate revisions and stock performance suggest it's a promising choice for investors.

feed.title: Why Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) is a Top Momentum Stock for the Long-Term
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) has been identified as a top momentum stock, earning a #1 (Strong Buy) rank from Zacks and a Momentum Style Score of A. The company, headquartered in Chicago, provides wealth management and asset services and has seen its shares rise 8.6% in the past four weeks. Analysts have revised earnings estimates upwards for fiscal 2026, making NTRS an attractive option for investors looking for strong momentum combined with favorable financial health.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price (TROW) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price (TROW) is expected to report a year-over-year increase in earnings and higher revenues for the quarter ended December 2025. While analysts anticipate quarterly earnings of $2.46 per share and revenues of $1.92 billion, the firm's Earnings ESP model suggests a bearish outlook, making a definitive prediction for an earnings beat difficult. Investors are advised to consider other factors beyond earnings surprise history.

feed.title: BD, Waters set completion date for $17.5B biosciences and diagnostics merger
feed.summary: BD and Waters have announced a target completion date of Feb. 9 for their $17.5 billion biosciences and diagnostics merger. This timeline was finalized after Waters shareholders overwhelmingly approved the issuance of shares to BD investors. The merger will see BD spin off its biosciences and diagnostics business to merge with a Waters subsidiary, giving BD shareholders a 39.2% stake in the combined entity and enabling both companies to pursue strategic growth and cost-cutting opportunities.

feed.title: Air Products (APD) Secures Major NASA Contract for Liquid Hydrogen Supply
feed.summary: Air Products (APD) has secured a significant $140 million contract with NASA to supply liquid hydrogen to several key facilities, including the Kennedy Space Center and Marshall Space Flight Center. This agreement highlights Air Products' role as a leading global industrial gas supplier, particularly for hydrogen and helium. Despite the contract, the company faces financial challenges, including declining revenue growth and a negative net margin, urging investors to monitor its future performance closely.

feed.title: MGM Resorts (MGM) Faces Decline in Las Vegas Strip Gaming Revenue
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International is grappling with a 6.1% decline in Las Vegas Strip gaming revenue in December, marking the second consecutive monthly decrease due to pricing issues and reduced international tourism. Despite its dominant market position and robust revenue growth, MGM faces financial challenges, including a high debt-to-equity ratio and an Altman Z-Score indicating distress. However, substantial insider buying activity suggests confidence in the company's future prospects amidst these financial and market-specific risks.

feed.title: Here’s Why Abbott Stock Could Deliver 10% Upside in 2026 After 15% Decline Last Year
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) stock is projected to deliver a 9.9% annualized return and a target price of $142.70 by 2026, representing a 31.8% total upside. This forecast is based on its diversified healthcare operations, consistent operating efficiency, and recent FDA approval for neuromodulation systems. The analysis uses projected revenue growth of 7.6%, operating margins of 24.9%, and an exit P/E multiple of 19.1x, considering both optimistic and pessimistic scenarios for device adoption and diagnostics recovery.

feed.title: What's Going On With Amazon Stock Wednesday?
feed.summary: Amazon (AMZN) stock is trending due to plans for 16,000 layoffs, an updated grocery strategy involving increased investment in Whole Foods Market, and growth in its cloud and retail segments driven by AI partnerships. Analysts from Wedbush, Bank of America, and KeyBanc have weighed in with positive outlooks, citing potential for market share gains in groceries, reduced capital expenditures, and strong revenue growth forecasts for the coming fiscal years. Despite these developments, AMZN shares were slightly down at the time of publication, ahead of its Q4 earnings report.

feed.title: Eli Lilly (LLY) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
feed.summary: Eli Lilly (LLY) is expected to report a significant year-over-year increase in earnings and revenues for the quarter ended December 2025, with an anticipated EPS of $7.02 and revenues of $17.87 billion. Despite a recent downward revision in the consensus EPS estimate, the company's Zacks Earnings ESP of +0.05% combined with a Zacks Rank #3 suggests a high probability of beating the consensus estimate. Historically, Eli Lilly has surpassed EPS estimates in three out of the last four quarters.

feed.title: Earnings Preview: Qualcomm (QCOM) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
feed.summary: Qualcomm (QCOM) is expected to report a year-over-year decline in earnings for Q1, despite higher revenues. The Zacks Consensus Estimate projects quarterly earnings of $3.37 per share and revenues of $12.23 billion. With a negative Earnings ESP and a Zacks Rank of #5, Qualcomm does not appear to be a strong candidate for an earnings beat, unlike Cirrus Logic (CRUS) which shows potential for a beat.

feed.title: Earnings Preview: Uber Technologies (UBER) Q4 Earnings Expected to Decline
feed.summary: Uber Technologies (UBER) is expected to report a year-over-year decline in earnings for Q4 2025, with an estimated $0.83 per share, a 74.1% decrease, despite a projected 19.4% increase in revenues to $14.28 billion. The Zacks Earnings ESP currently stands at -7.14%, indicating potential bearish sentiment from analysts, making a confident prediction of an earnings beat difficult despite a Zacks Rank #3. Historically, Uber has beaten consensus EPS estimates in the last four quarters, but an earnings surprise is not guaranteed.

feed.title: Phillips 66 (PSX) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
feed.summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) is expected to report significant year-over-year earnings growth for the quarter ended December 2025, with an estimated EPS of $2.10, representing a 1500% increase despite an expected 11.3% decline in revenues. The company has a positive Earnings ESP of +1.06% and a Zacks Rank of #3, suggesting a likely earnings beat. Marathon Petroleum (MPC), another industry player, is also expected to show earnings growth but has a Zacks Rank of #4 (Sell) and a 0.00% Earnings ESP, making an earnings beat less certain.

feed.title: Elevance Health Q4 Earnings Review: No Sign Of An End To The Pain (NYSE:ELV)
feed.summary: Elevance Health, Inc. (ELV) is facing significant margin and volume pressures, with its Q4 operating revenue down 55% year-over-year and weak guidance for 2026. The company's benefit expense ratio remains high at 90% due to medical inflation and increased utilization, impacting profitability. Analyst maintains a Hold rating on ELV, citing weak guidance, sector headwinds, and a lack of near-term catalysts for margin recovery.

feed.title: P&G hit with another class action over alleged lead in Tampax Pearl tampons
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble is facing a new class action lawsuit alleging its Tampax Pearl tampons contain lead, a known neurotoxin. The plaintiffs claim P&G falsely advertised the products as free from harmful substances and that independent testing confirmed lead in the vaginally inserted portion of the tampon. This lawsuit follows similar allegations made against P&G in November regarding unsafe lead levels in Tampax-brand tampons.

feed.title: eBay (EBAY) Reiterates Market Outperform Rating: Key Analyst Ins
feed.summary: Citizens analyst Andrew Boone has reiterated a Market Outperform rating for eBay (EBAY) and maintained a $115.00 price target. This decision aligns with other analysts who have recently raised their price targets for the e-commerce giant. Despite a consensus brokerage recommendation of "Hold," the reiteration suggests continued confidence in eBay's market performance.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividend of $1.35 (NYSE:NSC)
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE:NSC) declared a quarterly dividend of $1.35 per share, representing an annualized dividend of $5.40 and a yield of 1.9%. The ex-dividend date is February 6th, with payment on February 20th. The dividend appears well-covered with a payout ratio of 37.8%, and analysts expect a future payout ratio of 36.7%.

feed.title: Inventiva's Stock Surge Reflects Growing Investor Optimism
feed.summary: Inventiva's shares have surged by 50% in early 2026, signaling strong investor confidence in its MASH drug candidate, lanifibranor. Analysts anticipate a significant market for MASH treatments, bolstering Inventiva's prospects for commercialization and potential acquisition by larger pharmaceutical companies. The company, however, will likely need further funding to support the drug's launch if phase 3 results are positive.

feed.title: MarineMax Q1 2026 earnings preview
feed.summary: This article provides an earnings preview for MarineMax's Q1 2026 results. It focuses on setting expectations for the company's financial performance during this period.

feed.title: A Closer Look at Booking Holdings's Options Market Dynamics
feed.summary: Investors have shown a bullish sentiment towards Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) through recent options trades, with 11 uncommon trades detected. The market movers are focusing on a price range of $4650.0 to $5800.0 for BKNG over the next three months. Currently, Booking Holdings is trading at $5167.35 with a neutral RSI, and analysts have an average target price of $5897.75.

feed.title: ADM’s ex-CFO faces federal fraud charges
feed.summary: The SEC has accused Vikram Luthar, former CFO of Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM), of fraud for artificially inflating the nutrition business unit's value through retroactive adjustments. Luthar allegedly orchestrated these changes to meet performance targets, directly benefiting from a $130,000 bonus. ADM settled with the SEC for $40 million and two other executives paid disgorgement, though the company neither admitted nor denied the findings.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley reiterates Underweight rating on Progressive stock
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has reaffirmed its Underweight rating and $214.00 price target for Progressive Corp. (NYSE:PGR), despite the company's strong policy-in-force growth and undervaluation according to InvestingPro data. The firm acknowledges Progressive's operational strength, impressive revenue growth, and dividend history but maintains a cautious outlook, suggesting that sustained growth and margin improvement could lead to a more positive sentiment. This decision comes amidst other analyst updates, including an upgrade from Barclays and a lowered price target from BMO Capital.

feed.title: Truist Raises Price Target on PACCAR to $120 From $108, Keeps Hold Rating
feed.summary: Truist has increased its price target for PACCAR (PCAR) to $120 from $108, while maintaining a Hold rating on the stock. This adjustment follows PACCAR's report of Q4 2025 earnings, which saw net income and revenue fall due to lower demand and higher costs, despite exceeding revenue estimates. Other analysts from JPMorgan, Wells Fargo, BofA Securities, Morgan Stanley, and Citigroup have also made recent adjustments to their price targets for PACCAR.

feed.title: Imperial Oil's Sector Perform Rating, C$116 Price Target Maintained by RBC
feed.summary: RBC has maintained its Sector Perform rating and C$116 price target for Imperial Oil. The article also briefly mentions Unity Software's fourth-quarter financial results, reporting a 35% year-over-year revenue increase to $609 million, exceeding estimates, despite a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman Posts Q4 Beat, 2026 Outlook Disappoints
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman (NYSE: NOC) reported revenues and earnings for the fourth quarter that exceeded consensus estimates. However, the company's 2026 guidance for revenue and earnings fell below analysts' expectations, despite reiterating its free cash flow outlook. An analyst reiterated a Buy rating on the stock but noted that the guidance midpoint for both revenue and earnings was lower than anticipated.

feed.title: Google stock price today: Alphabet Class C inches up as regulators circle and a $135 million Android settlement lands
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc.'s Class C shares (GOOG) rose slightly as Google agreed to a $135 million settlement for an Android data use lawsuit, while facing new regulatory scrutiny in Europe and Britain regarding its Search and AI services. Investors are also anticipating Alphabet's earnings report on February 4th, amidst high expectations for Big Tech. The company's heavy investment in AI and potential regulatory changes pose both opportunities and risks for its stock performance.

feed.title: Notice to Long-Term Shareholders of Ibotta, Inc. (NYSE: IBTA); Lifecore Biomedical, Inc. (NASDAQ: LFCR); Molina Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: MOH); and Varonis Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: VRNS): Grabar Law Office Investigates Claims on Your Behalf
feed.summary: Grabar Law Office is investigating claims on behalf of long-term shareholders of Ibotta, Inc. (IBTA), Lifecore Biomedical, Inc. (LFCR), Molina Healthcare, Inc. (MOH), and Varonis Systems, Inc. (VRNS) for alleged breaches of fiduciary duties by their respective officers and directors. The investigations stem from issues such as misleading IPO statements, inaccurate financial reporting, undisclosed material adverse facts regarding cost trend assumptions, and false information regarding annual recurring revenue. The law office encourages affected shareholders to contact them to seek corporate reforms, return of funds, and court-approved incentive awards at no cost.

feed.title: Hot Shot's Secret expands product offerings at Tractor Supply Company
feed.summary: Hot Shot's Secret has significantly expanded its product availability at Tractor Supply Company, adding five new fuel and oil treatments to the existing four. This partnership allows Tractor Supply, a large rural lifestyle retailer, to offer a broader range of high-performance products for both commercial and personal diesel and gasoline-powered equipment nationwide. The expansion includes new products like Premium DEFender, LX4 Lubricity Extreme Fuel Treatment, Gasoline Extreme Fuel Treatment, Diesel Winter Rescue, and EDT+ Winter Defense Anti-Gel Fuel Booster.

feed.title: USW On Strike Against ArcelorMittal In Ohio
feed.summary: Members of United Steelworkers (USW) Local 3057 are on strike against ArcelorMittal in Shelby, Ohio, since January 13th, due to disagreements over wages, health care benefits, and work schedule changes. The 450-member bargaining unit, which produces high-quality steel tubing, is fighting to secure a fair contract, as the company proposes significant changes that could impact worker paychecks and require spouses to use separate insurance plans. The union is receiving strong community support and remains ready to continue bargaining.

feed.title: General Dynamics FY 2025 presentation: double-digit growth amid record backlog
feed.summary: General Dynamics (NYSE:GD) released its full-year 2025 financial results, reporting significant double-digit growth in revenue, operating earnings, and net earnings, alongside a record 30.3% surge in its total backlog. Despite these strong financial and operational improvements across its Aerospace, Combat Systems, Marine Systems, and Technologies segments, the company's stock experienced a pre-market decline. General Dynamics provided optimistic guidance for 2026, projecting continued revenue and EPS growth.

feed.title: GE Vernova Lifts Revenue Forecasts Amid Surging Orders
feed.summary: GE Vernova has significantly increased its revenue guidance for 2026 and 2028, driven by a surge in orders and the early closure of its Prolec acquisition. Despite missing some 2025 EBITDA forecasts, the company saw substantial order growth in its power and electrification segments, with institutional investors increasing their stakes. This positive outlook is further supported by a doubled quarterly dividend and strong analyst ratings, positioning GE Vernova as a key player in the energy transition.

feed.title: General Mills appoints Joan Bottarini to board, declares dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: General Mills (NYSE:GIS) has announced the appointment of Joan Bottarini, CFO of Hyatt Hotels Corporation, to its board of directors, effective January 26, 2026. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.61 per share, continuing its 127-year streak of uninterrupted dividend payments. This news comes as Essex Property Trust, a company Bottarini previously worked for, also declared a dividend and faced recent analyst downgrades.

feed.title: Littelfuse Inc stock hits 52-week high at $309.56
feed.summary: Littelfuse Inc. (LFUS) stock has reached a new 52-week high of $309.56, reflecting a 25.9% increase over the past year and a 33.85% actual one-year return according to InvestingPro data. The company's strong performance is supported by a healthy current ratio, moderate debt, 16 consecutive years of dividend increases, and recent strategic moves like the acquisition of Basler Electric. Despite trading at a high P/E ratio, analysts like Oppenheimer maintain an Outperform rating with an increased price target, while Benchmark holds a Neutral rating due to a softer Q4 outlook.

feed.title: Mizuho upgrades Applied Materials to Outperform as WFE spending accelerates
feed.summary: Mizuho Securities upgraded Applied Materials (AMAT) to Outperform from Neutral, citing expected benefits from increased capital expenditures in the U.S., Taiwan, and Japan. The firm anticipates the world's second-largest supplier of wafer fabrication equipment will see accelerated spending in the sector. Mizuho also raised its price target for AMAT.

feed.title: Is Analog Devices (ADI) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
feed.summary: Analog Devices (ADI) currently holds an average brokerage recommendation (ABR) of 1.58, indicating a strong buy leaning, with 22 out of 33 firms giving a "Strong Buy" rating. While this suggests optimism, the article cautions that ABRs can be biased due to brokerage firms' vested interests. It recommends using the Zacks Rank, which is based on earnings estimate revisions, as a more reliable indicator for stock performance, noting that ADI currently has a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

feed.title: Short Interest in Chipmos Technologies (NASDAQ:IMOS) Grows By 302.2%
feed.summary: Chipmos Technologies (NASDAQ:IMOS) saw a significant surge in short interest in January, increasing by 302.2% to 89,881 shares. This represents about 0.3% of shares outstanding with a short-interest ratio of 2.2 days. The company, which has a market cap of $1.47 billion and a high PE ratio of 260.21, currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts despite beating recent earnings estimates.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal's ROE Gap to Peers Expected to Narrow -- Market Talk
feed.summary: The article discusses the strong financial results of Unity Software in the fourth quarter, with revenue increasing by 35% year-over-year to $609 million, surpassing analyst expectations. Despite the strong revenue growth, Unity reported a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share. The broader context mentions Bank of Montreal's return on equity (ROE) gap to its peers is expected to narrow.

feed.title: Brokers Suggest Investing in Merck (MRK): Read This Before Placing a Bet
feed.summary: This article analyzes Merck (MRK) from the perspective of brokerage recommendations versus the proprietary Zacks Rank. While Merck has an average brokerage recommendation (ABR) of 1.89 (approximating Strong Buy to Buy), the Zacks Rank currently assigns it a #4 (Sell) due to declining earnings estimate revisions. The article cautions investors against relying solely on brokerage recommendations, which often have a positive bias, and suggests using the more objective Zacks Rank for investment decisions.

feed.title: Feld Michael, evp at Becton Dickinson, sells $15k in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Michael Feld, Executive Vice President at Becton Dickinson & Co (NYSE:BDX), sold 75 shares of common stock for $15,204. This transaction was executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Becton Dickinson has also recently announced a quarterly dividend, authorized share repurchases, and seen its Biosciences & Diagnostic Solutions unit approved for combination with Waters Corporation.

feed.title: Truist Securities Raises Sysco (SYY) Price Target to $94 | SYY S
feed.summary: Truist Securities analyst Jake Bartlett has increased the price target for Sysco (SYY) to $94.00 from $90.00, while maintaining a "Buy" rating. This adjustment reflects a 4.44% increase and a positive outlook on the company. Sysco, a major U.S. foodservice distributor, has an average target price of $89.72 from 14 analysts, implying a 6.55% upside from its current price.

feed.title: EQT jumps to 6th-largest U.S. oil and gas producer in new industry ranking
feed.summary: EQT has risen to become the sixth-largest oil and gas producer in the United States, according to a new industry ranking. This achievement highlights a trend of improved national standings for several Appalachian producers, including two other companies from southwestern Pennsylvania. The natural gas giant's increased position comes amidst various challenges and developments in the energy sector.

feed.title: ImmunityBio (IBRX) Sheds 4% on Profit-Taking After 14-Day Run
feed.summary: ImmunityBio Inc. (IBRX) saw a 4.19% decline after 14 consecutive days of gains, as investors engaged in profit-taking. Despite the recent dip, the company's stock had surged 271% for the month of January due to positive clinical trial results, a significant sales increase for its Anktiva therapy, and international market expansion. ImmunityBio is also expected to release detailed results from its QUILT-3.078 Phase 2 study for glioblastoma treatment.

feed.title: Elbit Systems (NASDAQ:ESLT) Reaches New 12-Month High - What's Next?
feed.summary: Elbit Systems (NASDAQ:ESLT) recently hit a new 52-week high of $739.02, closing at $735.17 on light trading volume. Analyst sentiment is mixed, with an average "Hold" rating and a price target of $550.33, despite a recent "Buy" upgrade from Wall Street Zen. The company exceeded EPS estimates in its last earnings report and announced a quarterly dividend, while institutional investors have adjusted their holdings.

feed.title: Bank of America's Rock-Bottom P/E and 25% Upside Potential
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) experienced a recent pullback despite strong 2025 performance and impressive earnings, bringing its P/E ratio to one of the lowest among mega-cap stocks. Analysts, including Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley, see this as a solid buy-the-dip opportunity with potential for over 25% upside from current levels. While risks like proposed credit card interest rate caps exist, BAC's diversified revenue base and scale are expected to provide a buffer.

feed.title: Is Parker-Hannifin (PH) Still Priced Fairly After Its 40% One Year Rally
feed.summary: This article analyzes whether Parker-Hannifin (PH) is still fairly priced following a 40% rally over the past year. Using a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio comparison, Simply Wall St suggests the stock may be overvalued by approximately 25.3% based on its intrinsic value and trades above its tailored "Fair Ratio." The analysis encourages investors to consider different valuation approaches and their own narratives.

feed.title: Biotech Inventiva's 50% surge shows investor optimism over liver disease drug
feed.summary: Shares of biotech company Inventiva surged by 50%, indicating strong investor confidence in its liver disease drug. This optimism was reported by Reuters and highlighted on TradingView, alongside other related financial news regarding pharmaceutical stocks.

feed.title: Chipotle Mexican Grill turns up heat with menu innovation
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill is reintroducing its popular Chicken al Pastor dish to its UK menus for a limited time, marking its second menu innovation in the UK this year. The fan-favourite, last available in 2024, returns due to high demand and will be available starting February 10th. Chipotle is also launching gift cards in the UK and will offer a halal-suitable version of Chicken al Pastor in nearly half of its UK restaurants.

feed.title: AMD stock price rises as chip rally rolls on ahead of Fed decision and earnings
feed.summary: Shares of Advanced Micro Devices (AMD.O) saw a 1.9% increase, reaching $256.72, and peaking at an intraday high of $258.65. This rise is attributed to a broader rally in chip shares, pushing the S&P 500 above 7,000, as investors await a Federal Reserve rate decision and upcoming Big Tech earnings. AMD is set to report its fiscal fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results on February 3, with particular focus on data-center demand and its AI chip business.

feed.title: ICL: Final agreement secures $2.54B valuation, supply continuity, and outlines 2026 concession tender
feed.summary: ICL has finalized a binding agreement with Israel, valuing assets at $2.54 billion and ensuring downstream supply until 2035. The agreement also outlines a new concession tender process to begin in 2026, with national security considerations potentially limiting foreign bidders. This update is based on an investor update from ICL Group Ltd. [ICL] on January 28, 2026.
